title: Led On
desc: Turn on a single LED to understand the basics of electricity and pin outputs.

title: Car Travigator Blinking
desc: Blink an LED repeatedly to master timing control, delays, and loops.

title: Double Led On
desc: Control two LEDs simultaneously using different digital output pins.

title: Double Led Blink
desc: Program two LEDs to blink in patterns, building a custom light sequence.

title: Triple LEDS
desc: Control three LEDs at the same time to create custom lighting effects.

title: Traffic Light
desc: Build a traffic light sequencer using red, yellow, and green LEDs.

title: Car front and rear lights
desc: Simulate a car's head and tail lights by controlling four LEDs.

title: Party Lights
desc: Create a sequencing light show with four blinking LEDs.

title: Increasing Brightness In A Room
desc: Light up five LEDs to simulate dimming or brightness steps.

title: Party Lightnening
desc: Build a dynamic party light sequence using five LEDs.

title: Buzzer Control With Arduino(On and OFF)
desc: Control a piezo buzzer to produce basic sound alerts.

title: Buzzer Control With Arduino(On and OFF)
desc: Program a buzzer to beep at regular intervals for a custom alarm.

title: Button Lit
desc: Use a push button to control a single LED interactively.

title: Twin Light
desc: Control two LEDs with a button press, learning about input states.

title: Tri-Light
desc: Build a button-controlled triple LED system.

title: Traffic Light
desc: Introduction to traffic light modules and how to use them with Arduino.

title: Red Means Stop
desc: Turn on the red LED on the traffic light module.

title: Traffic Light Red Only Blink
desc: Make the red LED blink to signal warning.

title: Yellow Means Get Ready
desc: Turn on the yellow LED to signal preparation.

title: Traffic Light Yellow Only Blink
desc: Make the yellow LED blink for caution.

title: Green Means Go
desc: Turn on the green LED to signal clear road.

title: Trafic Light Green Blink Only
desc: Make the green LED blink for pedestrian crossing warnings.

title: Red-G-B
desc: Display red color using the RGB LED module.

title: Red Blink
desc: Blink the red color on the RGB LED module.

title: Turning On/Off Green Led On Rgb
desc: Display green color using the RGB LED module.

title: Green Led Blinking On Rgb
desc: Blink the green color on the RGB LED module.

title: R -G-Blue
desc: Display blue color using the RGB LED module.

title: Blue Led Blinking On Rgb
desc: Blink the blue color on the RGB LED module.

title: Rainbow Colors On Rgb
desc: Cycle through multiple colors to create a rainbow effect on the RGB LED.

title: Light Intensity Checker
desc: Measure ambient light levels using a Light Dependent Resistor (LDR).

title: Robot Arm-Up
desc: Control a servo motor's rotation angle to simulate a robotic arm.

title: Car windshield wiper
desc: Program a servo motor to sweep back and forth like a wiper.

title: Noise Checker – Sound Sensor Threshold Detection
desc: Detect sound levels and trigger alerts when it exceeds a threshold.

title: LED and Ultrasonic Sensor Control
desc: Measure distance with an ultrasonic sensor and light up an LED as visual indicator.

title: LED and Ultrasonic Sensor Control
desc: Control two LEDs based on object proximity using an ultrasonic sensor.

title: LED and Ultrasonic Sensor Control
desc: Create a 3-stage distance tracker using an ultrasonic sensor and three LEDs.

title: Smart Alert Lightining System
desc: Create a distance-based warning system using four LEDs.

title: Smart Sound Alert System
desc: Trigger an audible buzzer alarm when light levels drop.

title: TRAFFIC LIGHT with STEMAIDE
desc: Display different colors on an RGB LED based on ambient light levels.

title: TRAFFIC LIGHT with STEMAIDE
desc: Control a traffic light module based on LDR light sensor feedback.

title: Operating A Sound Sensor Wiith One Led
desc: Light up an LED by clapping or making sound.

title: OPERATING A SOUND SENSOR WITH TWO LEDs
desc: Control two LEDs simultaneously with sound level triggers.

title: OPERATING A SOUND SENSOR WITH THREE LEDs
desc: Create a sound-activated multi-LED display system.

title: Operating A Sound Sensor And Led With Stemaide
desc: Control traffic signal sequences with sound triggers.

title: Smart Sound Alert System
desc: Build a proximity alarm that changes buzzer frequency based on distance.

title: Ultrasonic distance sensor with traffic light module.
desc: Control traffic lights based on vehicle proximity.

title: Smart lightening system with RGB module.
desc: Change RGB LED colors based on object distance.

title: LED Control with Arduino and Push Button
desc: Toggle a single LED's power state with a push button.

title: LED Control with Arduino and Push Button
desc: Blink an LED when the push button is held down.

title: LED Control with Arduino and Push Button
desc: Toggle two LEDs simultaneously with a button press.

title: LED Control with Arduino and Push Button
desc: Blink two LEDs in alternate patterns using a push button.

title: LED Control with Arduino and Push Button
desc: Control three LEDs with a single button input.

title: LED Control with Arduino and Push Button
desc: Toggle a set of four LEDs with a button press.

title: LED Control with Arduino and Push Button
desc: Blink four LEDs in sequence with a button press.

title: Push Button with Buzzer
desc: Make an interactive button-activated audio buzzer.

title: Push Button with Traffic Light Module
desc: Build a pedestrian-activated traffic crossing button.

title: STEMAIDE Pushbutton And RGB Control
desc: Cycle RGB LED colors interactively with a push button.

title: Smart Street Light (1 Led)
desc: Design an automatic street light that turns on when it gets dark.

title: SMART STREET LIGHT (2 LEDs)
desc: Control two smart street lights based on light level thresholds.

title: SMART STREET LIGHT (4 LEDs)
desc: Build a multi-level smart street lighting system with four LEDs.

title: SMART STREET LIGHT (5 LEDs)
desc: Create a high-density smart lighting system using five LEDs and LDR.

title: Smart Gauge Water Level Monitor
desc: Build a water level monitor using ultrasonic sensor depth measurement.

title: Smart Intruder Alarm System
desc: Build a home security alarm using an ultrasonic motion sensor.

title: Smart Traffic Light System
desc: Build a pedestrian crossing system with ultrasonic detection.

title: Smart Bed Lighting System
desc: Create a motion-activated bed light system.

title: Smart Car Parking Gate
desc: Build a parking barrier gate that opens automatically when a car approaches.

title: Smart Clap Device Controller
desc: Design a clap-activated home appliance controller.
